title: Her First Affaire
writer: Frederick J. Jackson, Merrill Rogers, Dion Titheradge
actors: Ida Lupino, George Curzon, Diana Napier
plot: A headstrong young girl falls completely for a writer of trashy novels, and insinuates herself into his household, all to the chagrin of her erstwhile fiancé.He conspires with the author's wife to show the girl how foolish she's b...
